design_concept: Contemporary coastal residence — single-story with rooftop terrace option. Open-plan living oriented toward pool and patio. Natural materials: exposed concrete, weathered wood, large glazing to maximize ocean views. Pool positioned as visual axis from entry through living area.
review_notes: Concept reflects full 216 sqm program including pool. Design is strong — note that budget alignment review at Segment G will be critical given Los Cabos construction costs.
